raw_input:
[5.0/5] This is a must have I believe I have had this long enough to determine it's value. It is well worth the money. This is a must have for any beauty routine. It comes very well packaged and protected. It comes with the charging stand, plug, charging cord, little filters that go inside the product and three Microdermabrasion tips. The tip that comes already on the Diamond Microdermabrasion is the normal one, then there is one for sensitive skin, and the last one is a precision tip. When you use this it gently uses suction and the the diamond tips to pull away the dead skin, black heads and even small whiteheads. Afterwards lightly wash your face. It does leave your face a little red but only for a few hours. By the next it was gone. I did have some areas of slight bruising from going over the same area to often. It wasn't really bruising it was more like a suction mark on your skin but it was gone by the next day. I have used this several times and I absolutely love it. My skin looks and feels much better. This is one of those things that I won't be able to live without. I love it. Had I not seen it on sell, this is one of those things I would have never tried but since it was discounted I am so glad I got it and I think you would have too. I highly recommend this Microdermabrasion device. [1.0/5] Not happy. I had high hopes for this product. But unfortunately I think I received a used product, and therefore I sent it back immediately. Not happy. [5.0/5] Does what it says... Good product, time consuming but worth it. Glad I got it. [5.0/5] Facial wonder This microderm is great for clearing up skin, really exfoliates and helps get the "gunk" out of your pores. Also great for spot acne treatment too, it helps extract zits and they heal up faster. [4.0/5] Great Micro-dermabrasion First time ever using a Micro-dermabrasion, so I didn't know what to expect. I was delightfully surprised and I loved it. It was easy to operate and the instructions were clear and easy to understand. The results were as claimed. I would recommend this product to anyone seeking to revitalize and add youthful look to their skin. The Micro-dermabrasion is very well made and even though I have only used it once I can tell it will last. [5.0/5] Where has this been all my life?! I'm 37 years old, and have been hearing older women say they wish they'd started taking care of their skin sooner. So I'm trying to learn from them. The problem is, I tried using products that said they would sting once applied, but when I apply them, I feel nothing. My skin is hard as nails. Even though I've exfoliated for years, I figured I must have a ton of dead skin begging to be removed. Then I found this product *enter heavenly choir singing*. So I used the microdermabrasion machine on the lowest setting on my face and afterwards, I finally felt tingling and stinging when using my liquid products! lol My face turned red from the microdermabrasion, but only for about 5 minutes on my face, maybe 10 minutes on my neck, and less than 5 minutes on my hands. I imagine the reaction time could be different if your skin isn't made of nails. It doesn't hurt- it feel like a small piece of sandpaper being rubbed against against your skin, and it makes a kissy noise when it comes off. Afterwards, my skin was super smooth- if you've ever used DHC's Velvet Coat primer on your face, my face felt a lot like that. It was great! And then I tried putting on some of my serum and whoo hoo! I felt the sting! I was thrilled! I changed my filter and blech! So happy to see all that dead skin on the filter. I couldn't be more pleased with this product and I highly recommend it for tough as nails skin! [5.0/5] Great! I really like this. It leaves pores clean and my skin smooth. Thanks! [1.0/5] Zero Suction Save Your Money I did a lot of research on microdermabrasion machines I love the results at the spa but I don't want to pay spa prices all the time. I decided to purchase this one because of the great deal. It arrived quickly, packaging was really nice the tool itself is heavy and seemed like it would do a good job. After sufficiently charging it I tried it but there was zero suction. Sent it back immediately. [5.0/5] I really can't say enough good things about this machine! *UPDATE* April 18th, 2017 - I was just browsing the net trying to find a light therapy device and I was getting pretty exasperated with too many choices. I happened to look over and see my Dermabraze MD unit on my vanity and thought, I wonder if their company makes other products? So when I Google'd the company one of the first things I saw was a "Fakespot" link, and having only ever seen products with an F rating I thought I'd check this one because I expected it to have rave reviews like mine. I was FLOORED when I saw the grade F! That simply cannot be accurate! I purchased mine in November of 2016, and nearly 6 months later I still regard it as the best money I've ever spent on skincare, PERIOD. I used it on my full face just last night! It gets a regular workout too, between myself, my mother and my daughter. Even my son has used it! I just had to come update my review when I saw that deceitful grade but in a way I'm thankful because I know now that Fakespot can't be trusted. I KNOW THIS DEVICE WORKS AND WORKS FANTASTICALLY!

I'm fortunate to have had a great example when I was a child. My mother always took very good care of her skin. Until I reached my teen years I literally believed that all women used peel off masks, apricot scrub, Noxema and Oil of Olay, lol. Skin care has come a long way, and when I started working in the beauty industry I was introduced to higher quality products and left my mother's favorites in the dust, haha. As far as exfoliating, before trying this machine I'd always stuck with scrubs, chemical exfoliants and microdermabrasion crystal creams. Now I feel like a need a good kick in the rear for not investing in real microdermabrasion years ago! I absolutely love this machine ... it is an investment, but the effectiveness and sheer convenience of it make it more than worth the money. You just can't get results like this with any other method. My favorite thing about it is the suction. Sure, you can use products to manually exfoliate skin, but vacuuming the oil and dead cells that collect inside and clog pores combined with abrasion literally and immediately take years off the skin's appearance. It also allows the high dollar serums and moisturizers we apply to do a much better job. Again, to me this totally justifies the investment. If you're serious about skin care and spend good money on expensive products, you owe it to yourself to prep your skin so your products can do their jobs!

Pros of the Bright Therapy unit:

Rechargeable
Strong, adjustable suction
Different attachments for heavy, light and acute abrasion.
Comfortable to hold, fit's easily in the hand
Has disposable filters allowing you to see exactly what the machine removes every time you use it.

If you're looking for a great quality microdermabrasion system I think you'll be pleased with this one, I can't find a single con to owning it. I absolutely love mine! [1.0/5] quit working after two months My new favorite facial tool! I feel like I just rejuvenated my face! Works and feels just like my aesthetician's microdermabrasion tool. The only difference is I did it myself and just saved $85.00 bucks. I usually get my microdermabrasion's every 3 weeks at my Spa. I do rather enjoy them, however I thought I would buy one myself and give it a try. I actually like doing it myself better because I can go over certain oily parts of my skin several times more than my aesthetician does. This is a pretty powerful tool. I like the first setting because I have sensitive skin. My daughter used it but she used it on setting 4 and liked the more powerful suction. It is extremely nice and comes in a very expensive box. I am very very happy with this purchase.
I am re-submitting another review due to the product quit working after only 2 months. Outside of window to return (30 days only). I would not recommend this product. [5.0/5] Very Satisfied. Works Great! [3.0/5] Pro Diamond Microdermabrasion Handheld... so far, this product i am using every two days.
I am very concerned about how to clean these diamond heads. They are feeling dull after just 3 uses.
What do I do about this. Please respond if someone knows how to fix the diamond heads from dulling. [5.0/5] Five Stars Using and it is helping with liver spots [5.0/5] Great! I am a licensed esthetician, and I have only used this product once and I am pretty impressed. I used it on myself to get a feel for it. I love that it comes with a manual explaining in detail everything that comes with it as well as a chart that shows you each part of your face, the direction you should use, and max strength level that should be used. There are 4 suction levels, I never went above 2 for my first time playing around with it, even then, my skin felt so soft. It doesn't hurt while doing it, and personally I didn't have any discomfort the next day either. Over all great product so far and I am excited to keep practicing with it. [5.0/5] Really smooth skin Really worked great. Been trying it out for a week and I really like the way it makes your skin feel. Very smooth. My wife uses it too, she loves it.
We haven't had any problems with it so far. [5.0/5] Really smooth skin Really worked great. Been trying it out for a week and I really like the way it makes your skin feel. Very smooth. My wife uses it too, she loves it.
We haven't had any problems with it so far. [5.0/5] Really smooth skin Really worked great. Been trying it out for a week and I really like the way it makes your skin feel. Very smooth. My wife uses it too, she loves it.
We haven't had any problems with it so far. [4.0/5] the crystal tips are good but I went on to the website looking to ... i have not used the product yet, but i did check it out, the crystal tips are good but I went on to the website looking to see how much are the replaceable tips, but I couldn't find any I wasn't happy about that

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Most customers are very happy with this microdermabrasion device, with the majority giving it 4 or 5 stars. Reviewers consistently praise its ability to exfoliate skin, clean pores, remove dead skin, and leave skin feeling noticeably smoother. Several users noted it works similarly to professional spa treatments but at a fraction of the cost. The device is well-regarded for its build quality, ease of use, multiple suction settings, different tip attachments, rechargeable design, and clear instructions. Some users reported temporary redness after use, which faded within hours. One long-term user noted it works well for the whole family and remains effective after months of regular use. A licensed esthetician also gave it a positive review.

On the negative side, there were a few complaints worth noting. Two customers received units with no suction and returned them immediately, with one suspecting they received a used product. One customer was initially very happy but reported the device stopped working after just two months, which was outside the 30-day return window. One reviewer had concerns about the diamond tips becoming dull after only a few uses and could not find replacement tips on the company website.

Overall, the product is well-received by most buyers, though there are some concerns about long-term durability and the availability of replacement parts.
